title: Jes (courier)

{{Quote|Strap in, keep your mouth shut, and hang on to your lunch. You'll be standing on Danuta before you know it.|Jes to Jan Ors|<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>}}
'''Jes''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Born around [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], she joined the Alliance at a young age, and she had just passed her teens when she was stationed on the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''[[New Hope]]'' as a pilot.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

Flying [[Starship/Legends|starships]] as a [[Courier/Legends|courier]], delivering beings to locations throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], she was often annoyed by people who underestimated her because of her age, as well as annoying passengers.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], she took [[Jan Ors]] to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Danuta]] on [[Jes' courier ship|her ship]]. She offered to take her satchel of weapons, explosives and infiltration devices, and shoved them into a small locker, thinking that she was just one more woman carrying along her makeup, grumbling about it.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

Thanks to her speed, they arrived to Danuta about four [[Standard day/Legends|days]] later, one day before ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]''.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Now let's get a couple of things straight. I go by 'Jes,' not 'Jessica,' not 'dear,' and not 'honey.' This is my ship, I run it my way, and I don't need any advice from freeloading goof-offs. Got it?|Jes introducing herself to Jan Ors|<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />}}
Jes was a sassy young pilot who wore her [[Hair/Legends|hair]] in pigtails. Not conforming to the trends followed by other females, she didn't think much of make-up, especially when passengers brought trivial luggage aboard her narrow ship.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

Because of her age, people tended to call her "dear" or "honey" and (perhaps mistakenly) presumed her full name to be "Jessica," things that annoyed her enough that she made a point about them to new acquaintances. She was also annoyed when "freebooters" and talkative passengers thought they knew her job better than her and offered advice.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Soldier for the Empire'' audio drama]], Jes is unnamed, credited as "Courier" and is voiced by [[Virginia Burke]].
